backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend canister placeholder with no methods defined.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (standalone HTML pages, styles.css design system, script.js utilities) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, covering both the React app and the standalone HTML/CSS/JS version.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with six routes (Home, Donate, Request Help, Volunteer, Dashboard, Food Listings) wrapped in a shared layout with Navigation, BackgroundWrapper, Footer, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/BackgroundWrappe: Layout component that renders a fixed full-viewport food background image with a dark overlay and backdrop blur, wrapping all page content in a z-indexed container.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying copyright year, ByteMeal tagline, and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM parameters.
frontend/src/components/GlassCard.tsx: Reusable card component that applies either standard or strong glassmorphism CSS utility classes with optional className customization.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive glassmorphism navigation bar with logo, six desktop nav links with active-state highlighting, and a mobile hamburger dropdown menu.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags. Includes an `InternetIdentityProvider` component that persists identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and in-memory stores for Donations, AssistanceRequests, and Volunteers, exposing React Query hooks (useQuery/useMutation) for CRUD operations on each entity.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter and Poppins fonts, configures Tailwind CSS with custom OKLCH-based brand color tokens, and defines reusable component utility classes like glass-card, btn-orange, and text-gradient variants.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind CSS class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/AssistanceRequestForm: A form page for submitting food assistance requests, with validation, error display, and toast notifications on success or failure using the useAddAssistanceRequest mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page displaying live platform stats (donation, volunteer, and request counts) fetched via React Query, alongside a hardcoded list of assigned tasks with status indicators.
frontend/src/pages/DonorForm.tsx: React page with a validated form for submitting food donations, calling the `useAddDonation` mutation hook and showing toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/pages/FoodListings.tsx: React page that fetches and displays all donations in a responsive card grid using `useGetDonations`, with loading skeletons and formatted expiry dates.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page for ByteMeal featuring a hero section with CTA buttons, platform stats, and a features grid highlighting donation, assistance, volunteering, and waste reduction.
frontend/src/pages/VolunteerForm.tsx: React page with a validated form for volunteer registration, calling the `useAddVolunteer` mutation hook and displaying toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/standalone/assistance-form.html: Standalone HTML page for requesting food assistance, containing a form with fields for recipient name, number of people, urgency level, contact, and items required.
frontend/standalone/dashboard.html: Dashboard page for ByteMeal that displays live platform statistics (donations, requests, volunteers, claimed meals) and recent activity panels, rendered dynamically via script.js.
frontend/standalone/donor-form.html: Food donation submission form for ByteMeal where donors enter food item details (name, quantity, unit, expiry, location) with client-side validation.
frontend/standalone/food-listings.html: Browsable grid of available food donations with search and status filter controls, dynamically populated from localStorage via script.js.
frontend/standalone/index.html: Landing/home page for ByteMeal featuring a hero section, live stats, and a 'How It Works' features section linking to donor, assistance, volunteer, and listing pages.
frontend/standalone/script.js: Shared utility script for all ByteMeal standalone pages, providing mobile nav toggling, toast notifications, form validation helpers, button loading states, and localStorage CRUD helpers for donations, requests, and volunteers.
frontend/standalone/styles.css: Global CSS design system for ByteMeal's standalone site, defining glassmorphism styles, CSS custom properties (colors, shadows, typography), and responsive layout rules for navigation, cards, forms, and all UI components.
frontend/standalone/volunteer-form.html: Standalone HTML page for volunteer registration, containing a glassmorphism-styled form with fields for name, contact, location, preferred role, availability, and skills, plus client-side validation and submission handling.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the React frontend, extending the theme with custom brand colors (orange, sky blue), fonts (Inter, Poppins), border radii, shadows, and enabling plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 11) describing ByteMeal's architecture, existing features, and requirements, noting it is a glassmorphism food-waste management site with a standalone HTML/CSS/JS version runnable without build tools.
